calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner Frank J. Drago Clerk: K. Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael C. Hall, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Alfonso Cabansagan, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Sharon Jones.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on August 26, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Demand to Turn Over Possession of 5023 Third
Street, San Francisco, CA 94124, dated July 18, 2008---------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alfonso Cabansagan, and against defendant Sharon Jones as follows:

Plaintiff Alfonso Cabansagan shall recover from defendant Sharon Jones Holdover Damages in the amount of $12,900.00 and Costs in the amount of $432.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $13,332.00.

Plaintiff Alfonso Cabansagan is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 5023 Third Street, San Francisco, CA 94124-2311.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-SEP-10-2008: Michael Carrillo Hall, counsel for plaintiff Alfonso Cabasagan, who is also present

Settlement Conference off calendar. No appearance by defendant Sharon Jones. The SEP-15-2008 trial date remains.

Commissioner Frank Drago; Clerk L. Fong; not reported (218)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories - Unlawful Detainer(Set One), Special Interrogatories(Set One), Requests For Production Of Documents(Set One) And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Sharon Jones
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael Hall, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Alfonso Cabansagan; no other appearances.

After hearing, Plaintiff Alfonso Cabansagan's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories'Unlawful Detainer, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
